response.original_title: 1-866-216-0631 How do I recover my Zengo account if I change my phone or delete the app?
response.overview: If you need assistance with your account, + 1-(866)-216-0631 transactions, or wallet-related issues, customer support is available through official support channels. Visit the help center + 1-(866)-216-0631, start a live chat if available, or submit a support ticket with details about your issue. For faster assistance, have your account information and relevant transaction details ready. Always use the official support + 1-(866)-216-0631website to avoid scams and protect your account security.  You can only do this if you previously created a Recovery Kit for your account. (Never remove it or delete it).  Simply download the app on the new device you wish to use and enter your email to get started (the same email you used to create your account). Just follow the steps, and your account will be recovered.
response.title: 1-866-216-0631 How do I recover my Zengo account if I change my phone or delete the app?
